title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.595 - Liberal construction of act
text:
8.595.  Liberal construction of act. — Sections 8.500 to 8.590, being deemed necessary for the public health, welfare, peace and safety, shall be liberally construed to effect its purpose.
(L. 2002 S.B. 1191) 
Effective 6-07-02
